# Q3 Pricing Decision (2026)

**Decision date**: 2026-06-28 (planning call)  
**Effective**: through August 2026 (Q3)  
**Source**: `/workspace/operation/memory/q3-pricing-note.md` (raw remember from planning call)  

## Pro Tier Pricing

- **Hold through Q3**: $19/mo (unchanged through August)
- **Move in Q4**: $24/mo (starting October 2026)
- **Rationale**: Gross margin on Pro is thin after model-cost increase; price adjustment needed to sustain unit economics

## Annual Plan (New, Q4)

- **Launch**: Q4 2026
- **Price**: $230/yr (equivalent to ~$19.17/mo, or two months free on monthly)
- **Rationale**: Annual plan should lift retention past the 90-day churn cliff; supports ARR and reduces churn drag

## Incentives

- **Signup grant**: $3 (unchanged; stays active)

---

**Next review**: September 1, 2026 (ahead of Q4 implementation)  
**Owner**: [Pricing team]
